    A

    AbstractPlayer - Class in Game
    This class acts as a template to every Player model that can play the game.
    AbstractPlayer(String) - Constructor for class Game.AbstractPlayer
     
    acceptConnections() - Method in class Networking.SocketServer
    Accepts connections and starts a new thread for each connection.
    ai - package ai
     
    AIClientApplication - Class in Client
     
    AIClientApplication() - Constructor for class Client.AIClientApplication
     
    AIGameClient - Class in Client
    GameClient specialized for AI players.
    AIGameClient(String, int, ClientView, Strategy) - Constructor for class Client.AIGameClient
     
    AITUI - Class in Client.views
    AI Interface that hooks into GameClient to play automatically.
    AITUI(GameClient) - Constructor for class Client.views.AITUI
     
    ALREADYLOGGEDIN - Static variable in class Protocol.PROTOCOL
    Username is already taken.

    BLUE - Static variable in class Client.views.ConsoleUtils
     
    Board - Class in Game
     
    Board() - Constructor for class Game.Board
     
    boardIndex - Variable in class Game.Move

    BRIGHT_GREEN - Static variable in class Client.views.ConsoleUtils
     
    BRIGHT_RED - Static variable in class Client.views.ConsoleUtils
     
    BRIGHT_YELLOW - Static variable in class Client.views.ConsoleUtils
     
    broadcastGameOver(String, String) - Method in class Server.GameSession
    Broadcasts game over to both players.
    broadcastMove(int, int) - Method in class Server.GameSession
    Broadcasts a move to both players in this session.

    C

    CANNOTWHISPER - Static variable in class Protocol.PROTOCOL
    Private message delivery failed.
    CHAT - Static variable in class Protocol.PROTOCOL
    Client: Broadcast message.
    CLAIM_QUARTO - Static variable in class Protocol.PROTOCOL
    Claim Quarto (used as M value in MOVE command)
    clearScreen() - Static method in class Client.views.ConsoleUtils
     
    Client - package Client
     
    Client.views - package Client.views
     
    ClientApplication - Class in Client
     
    ClientApplication() - Constructor for class Client.ClientApplication
     
    ClientConnection - Class in Client
    Client-side connection that handles protocol parsing and delegates to GameClient.
    ClientConnection(String, int) - Constructor for class Client.ClientConnection
    Create a new ClientConnection by connecting to the given host and port.
    ClientHandler - Class in Server
    Handles business logic for a single connected client.
    ClientHandler(Socket, GameManager) - Constructor for class Server.ClientHandler
    Creates a new handler for a client connection.
    ClientState - Enum Class in Server
    Represents the connection state of a client.
    ClientView - Interface in Client.views
    Interface for displaying game state and server events to the user.
    close() - Method in class Client.ClientConnection
     
    close() - Method in class Networking.SocketConnection
    Close the network connection.
    close() - Method in class Networking.SocketServer
    Closes the server socket.
    computeMove(Game) - Method in class ai.GeniusStrategy
     
    computeMove(Game) - Method in class ai.MinimaxStrategy
     
    computeMove(Game) - Method in class ai.SmartStrategy
     
    computeMove(Game) - Method in interface ai.Strategy
    Determines which move (board position) to play.
    ComputerPlayer - Class in Client
     
    ComputerPlayer(String, Strategy) - Constructor for class Client.ComputerPlayer
     
    CONNECTED - Enum constant in enum class Server.ClientState
    Just connected, awaiting client's HELLO.
    connection - Variable in class Client.GameClient
     
    ConsoleUtils - Class in Client.views
    Helper class for console styling to match the reference server standard.
    ConsoleUtils() - Constructor for class Client.views.ConsoleUtils
     
    copy() - Method in class Game.Board
    Copies the board with another pointer.
    create(int) - Static method in class Server.Server
    Creates a server, prompting for a new port if the initial one is unavailable.
    createGame(ClientHandler, ClientHandler) - Method in class Server.GameManager
    Creates a new game session between two players, notifies them with NEWGAME, and tracks the session.
    CYAN - Static variable in class Client.views.ConsoleUtils
     

    D

    determineMove(Game) - Method in class Client.ComputerPlayer
     
    determineMove(Game) - Method in class Client.HumanPlayer
     
    determineMove(Game) - Method in class Game.AbstractPlayer
    Called when player has to make a move.
    determineMove(Game) - Method in class Server.ServerPlayer
     
    disconnect() - Method in class Client.GameClient
    Disconnect from the server.
    DISCONNECT - Static variable in class Protocol.PROTOCOL
    Game ended due to player disconnect
    displayGame(Game) - Method in class Client.views.AITUI
     
    displayGame(Game) - Method in interface Client.views.ClientView
    Displays the game to client.
    displayGame(Game) - Method in class Client.views.TUI
     
    doMove(Move) - Method in class Game.Game
    Does the move on the board if the move is valid.
    DRAW - Static variable in class Protocol.PROTOCOL
    Game ended in a draw

    E

    endGame(GameSession, String, String) - Method in class Server.GameManager
    Ends a game session by broadcasting game over and cleaning up.
    error(String) - Static method in class Client.views.ConsoleUtils
    Error log (Red).
    ERROR - Static variable in class Protocol.PROTOCOL
    Protocol violation.

    F

    FINAL_PIECE_NO_CLAIM - Static variable in class Protocol.PROTOCOL
    Place final piece without claiming Quarto

    G

    Game - package Game
     
    Game - Class in Game
     
    Game(AbstractPlayer, AbstractPlayer) - Constructor for class Game.Game
    Creates an instance of Quarto game with 2 players.
    GameClient - Class in Client
    Main game client that handles game state and user interaction.
    GameClient(String, int, ClientView) - Constructor for class Client.GameClient
    Creates a new GameClient and connects to the specified server.
    GameManager - Class in Server
    Central coordinator for matchmaking, username management, and active game tracking.
    GameManager() - Constructor for class Server.GameManager
     
    GAMEOVER - Static variable in class Protocol.PROTOCOL
    Game ended.
    GameSession - Class in Server
    Represents an active game session and manages communication between its players.
    GameSession(Game, ClientHandler, ClientHandler) - Constructor for class Server.GameSession
    Creates a new game session.
    GeniusStrategy - Class in ai
    Advanced AI strategy using Zobrist hashing, bitboards, and negamax.
    GeniusStrategy() - Constructor for class ai.GeniusStrategy
     
    getAvailablePieces() - Method in class Game.Game
    Gets the list of pieces still available to be picked.
    getBoard() - Method in class Game.Game
     
    getBoardIndex() - Method in class Game.Move
     
    getConnection() - Method in class Server.ClientHandler
     
    getCurrentPiece() - Method in class Game.Game
    Gets the current piece that must be placed.
    getCurrentPlayerName() - Method in class Game.Game
    Gets the name of the current player (who is taking their turn).
    getEndReason() - Method in class Game.Game
     
    getGame() - Method in class Server.GameSession
    Gets the game instance for this session.
    getGameSession() - Method in class Server.ClientHandler
     
    getId() - Method in class Game.Piece
     
    getLocalGame() - Method in class Client.GameClient
     
    getLoggedInUsers() - Method in class Server.GameManager
    Returns a list of all currently logged-in usernames.
    getName() - Method in class ai.GeniusStrategy
     
    getName() - Method in class ai.MinimaxStrategy
     
    getName() - Method in class ai.SmartStrategy
     
    getName() - Method in interface ai.Strategy
    Gets the name/description of this strategy.
    getName() - Method in class Game.AbstractPlayer
    Gets the name of player.
    getNextPiece() - Method in class Game.Move
     
    getOpponentName() - Method in class Game.Game
    Gets the name of the opponent (the player who is NOT currently taking their turn).
    getPiece() - Method in class Game.Move
     
    getPiece(int) - Method in class Game.Board
    Gets a particular piece in the field.
    getPieceById(int) - Method in class Game.Game
    Gets a piece by its ID from the available pieces.
    getPieceId() - Method in class Game.Move
     
    getPlayer() - Method in class Client.GameClient
     
    getPlayer1() - Method in class Server.GameSession
    Gets player 1 of this session.
    getPlayer2() - Method in class Server.GameSession
    Gets player 2 of this session.
    getPlayerName() - Method in class Server.ClientHandler
     
    getPort() - Method in class Networking.SocketServer
    Returns the port on which this server is listening for connections.
    getServerPort() - Method in class Server.Server
     
    getState() - Method in class Server.ClientHandler
     
    getStrategy() - Method in class Client.ComputerPlayer
     
    getValidMoves() - Method in class Game.Game
    Gives all valid moves that can be played in the current state of the game.
    getWinnerName() - Method in class Game.Game
     
    GREEN - Static variable in class Client.views.ConsoleUtils
     

    H

    handleConnection(Socket) - Method in class Networking.SocketServer
    Creates a new connection handler for the given socket.
    handleConnection(Socket) - Method in class Server.Server
    Handles a new client connection by creating a ClientHandler.
    handleDisconnect() - Method in class Client.ClientConnection
    Called when disconnected from server.
    handleDisconnect() - Method in class Networking.SocketConnection
    Handles a disconnect from the connection, i.e., when the connection is closed.
    handleDisconnect() - Method in class Server.ServerConnection
    Called when client disconnects.
    handleDisconnect(ClientHandler) - Method in class Server.GameManager
    Handles all cleanup when a client disconnects.
    handleMessage(String) - Method in class Client.ClientConnection
    Parses incoming protocol messages and delegates to GameClient.
    handleMessage(String) - Method in class Networking.SocketConnection
    Handles a message received from the connection.
    handleMessage(String) - Method in class Server.ServerConnection
    Parses incoming protocol messages and delegates to ClientHandler.
    handleStart() - Method in class Networking.SocketConnection
    Handles a start of the connection.
    hasWinningLine() - Method in class Game.Board
    Checks if there is a winning line on the board.
    HELLO - Static variable in class Protocol.PROTOCOL
    Initiates/responds to handshake.
    HELLO_RECEIVED - Enum constant in enum class Server.ClientState
    Client sent HELLO, server responded, awaiting LOGIN.
    HumanPlayer - Class in Client
     
    HumanPlayer(String) - Constructor for class Client.HumanPlayer

    id - Variable in class Game.Piece
     
    IN_GAME - Enum constant in enum class Server.ClientState
    Currently in an active game.
    IN_QUEUE - Enum constant in enum class Server.ClientState
    In the matchmaking queue, waiting for opponent.

    Standard info log (White/Default).

    Prints a message with a timestamp and a " > " separator, replicating the reference style.

    log(String, String, String, String) - Static method in class Client.views.ConsoleUtils
    Highlights a specific part of a message.
    LOGGED_IN - Enum constant in enum class Server.ClientState
    Logged in with username, can use LIST, QUEUE, etc.
    loggedIn - Variable in class Client.GameClient
     
    login(String) - Method in class Client.GameClient

    makeFirstMove(int) - Method in class Client.GameClient
    Make the first move (just give a piece, no placement).
    makeMove(int, int) - Method in class Client.GameClient
    Make a move in the current game.
    MinimaxStrategy - Class in ai
    Advanced AI using Minimax with Alpha-Beta pruning.
    MinimaxStrategy() - Constructor for class ai.MinimaxStrategy
    Default constructor: depth 4, 2 second limit.

    Creates a MinimaxStrategy with configurable parameters.

    SEPARATOR - Static variable in class Protocol.PROTOCOL
    Separator character used between command and arguments
    Server - package Server
     
    Server - Class in Server
    Main server class that accepts TCP connections and manages client sessions.
    Server(int) - Constructor for class Server.Server
    Creates a new server instance on the given port.
    ServerApplication - Class in Server
    Main entry point for the Server application.
    ServerApplication() - Constructor for class Server.ServerApplication
     
    ServerConnection - Class in Server
    Server-side connection wrapper that extends the base SocketConnection.
    ServerConnection(Socket) - Constructor for class Server.ServerConnection
    Creates a new ServerConnection wrapping the given socket.
    ServerPlayer - Class in Server
    Server-side player representation for networked games.
    ServerPlayer(String) - Constructor for class Server.ServerPlayer

    setClientHandler(ClientHandler) - Method in class Server.ServerConnection
    Sets the handler for client events.
    setGameClient(GameClient) - Method in class Client.ClientConnection
    Sets the game client to delegate events to.

    Sets a particular piece in the field.

    SmartStrategy - Class in ai
    Smart AI strategy that evaluates positions.
    SmartStrategy() - Constructor for class ai.SmartStrategy
     
    SocketConnection - Class in Networking
    Wrapper for a Socket and implements reading messages that consist of a single line from the socket.
    SocketConnection(String, int) - Constructor for class Networking.SocketConnection
    Make a new TCP connection to the given host and port.
    SocketConnection(InetAddress, int) - Constructor for class Networking.SocketConnection
    Make a new TCP connection to the given host and port.
    SocketConnection(Socket) - Constructor for class Networking.SocketConnection
    Create a new SocketConnection.
    SocketServer - Class in Networking
    Implements a networking server which accepts connection from clients.
    SocketServer(int) - Constructor for class Networking.SocketServer
    Creates a new Server that listens for connections on the given port.
    start() - Method in class Client.ClientConnection
     
    start() - Method in class Client.GameClient
    Starts the connection and begins the handshake.
    start() - Method in class Game.Game
    Main function to be called when starting a particular game.
    start() - Method in class Networking.SocketConnection
    Start receiving messages and call methods of the given handler to handle the messages.
    start() - Method in class Server.ClientHandler
    Starts the connection's receive loop.
    start() - Method in class Server.ServerConnection
     
    startGame(GameSession) - Method in class Server.ClientHandler
    Called when this client starts a game.
    stop() - Method in class Server.Server
    Stops the server and closes all client connections.
    Strategy - Interface in ai
    Interface for AI strategies that can play Quarto.
    success(String) - Static method in class Client.views.ConsoleUtils
    Success log (Green).

    T

    toString() - Method in class Game.Board
     
    toString() - Method in class Game.Piece
    Formats a piece to a string representation: Shape: () = Round, [] = Square Color: D = Dark, L = Light Solid: * = Solid, .
    toString(List<Piece>) - Method in class Game.Board
    Generates a string representation of the board with available pieces shown below.
    TUI - Class in Client.views
    Text-based user interface for the game client.
    TUI() - Constructor for class Client.views.TUI
     

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class Server.ClientState
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class Server.ClientState
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    VICTORY - Static variable in class Protocol.PROTOCOL
    Game ended with a winner
    view - Variable in class Client.GameClient
     

    W

    warning(String) - Static method in class Client.views.ConsoleUtils
    Warning log (Yellow).
    WHISPER - Static variable in class Protocol.PROTOCOL
    Private message.
    WHITE - Static variable in class Client.views.ConsoleUtils
     
    WRONGKEY - Static variable in class Protocol.PROTOCOL
    Authentication failed with different public key.

    Y

    YELLOW - Static variable in class Client.views.ConsoleUtils
